info.title: CourtListener REST API
info.description: REST API providing programmatic access to US court opinions, PACER docket data, judge records, financial disclosures, oral argument audio, citation lookup and network analysis, search alerts, and case visualizations. Operated by the Free Law Project.

get.description: Returns a list of opinions

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: response format for calls (XML,JSON,JSONP)

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: common delimited fields for return fields

parameters.name: order_by
parameters.description: which field to order results by

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: number of records to limit response listing by (1000 max)

parameters.name: absolute_url
parameters.description: pull the detail for an opinion

parameters.name: blocked
parameters.description: Whether the opinion should be blocked from search engines

parameters.name: citation_count
parameters.description: The number of times the opinion has been cited by other opinions

parameters.name: court
parameters.description: The ID of the court where the opinion was written

parameters.name: date_filed
parameters.description: The date the opinion was filed by the court

parameters.name: date_modified
parameters.description: The date and time the opinion was last modified

parameters.name: extracted_by_ocr
parameters.description: Whether the text of the opinion was extracted from an image using OCR

parameters.name: precedential_status
parameters.description: Whether the opinion has precedential value

parameters.name: time_retrieved
parameters.description: The date and time the opinion was added to our system
